problem.title: Convert Sorted Array to Binary Search Tree
problem.description: Given an integer array nums where the elements are sorted in ascending order, convert it to a height-balanced binary search tree.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Recursive
solutions.description: Always pick the middle element of the current subarray as the root, which guarantees the resulting BST is height-balanced because the left and right subtrees differ in size by at most one. Recursively apply the same logic to the left and right halves to build both subtrees.
